# Jane Smith ## Contact Email: [jane@example.com](mailto:jane@example.com) Phone: +1-555-987-6543 City: San Francisco Country: US Country: California ## Profiles [linkedin - janesmith](https://linkedin.com/in/janesmith) [github - janesmith](https://github.com/janesmith) ## Summary Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring teams. ## Work ### Senior Software Engineer ##### Jan, 2020 * <p>&lt;p&gt;Lead engineer for the platform team, owning core API infrastructure.&lt;/p&gt;</p> * <p>&lt;p&gt;Reduced API latency by 45% through caching and query optimization&lt;/p&gt;</p> * <p>&lt;p&gt;Designed microservices architecture serving 2M daily requests&lt;/p&gt;</p> * <p>&lt;p&gt;Mentored 4 junior engineers through technical growth plans&lt;/p&gt;</p> ### Full Stack Developer ##### Jan, 2017 - Jan, 2020 * <p>&lt;p&gt;Built customer-facing web applications from prototype to production.&lt;/p&gt;</p> * <p>&lt;p&gt;Built real-time dashboard used by 15,000+ daily active users&lt;/p&gt;</p> * <p>&lt;p&gt;Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deploy time from 2 hours to 8 minutes&lt;/p&gt;</p> ## Education ### University of Technology - Bachelor of Science in Computer Science ##### Jan, 2013 - Jan, 2017 ## Skills * Expert in Languages (<p>TypeScript</p> , <p>JavaScript</p> , <p>Python</p> , <p>Go</p> ) * Expert in Frontend (<p>React</p> , <p>Next.js</p> , <p>HTML/CSS</p> , <p>Tailwind</p> ) * Advanced in Backend & Cloud (<p>Node.js</p> , <p>PostgreSQL</p> , <p>AWS</p> , <p>Docker</p> )
